stemHtml: An aeroplane is in the cruise when it suffers from an outflow valve malfunction where the valve gets stuck in the open position. This in turn causes a slow decompression and the passengers start to complain about ear pain and popping sensations. What should be the first action of the flight crew?

options.a: Don oxygen masks immediately as this should be the first action in any decompression
options.b: First check and follow the checklist since the flight crew only needs to don oxygen masks if the aircraft is above 13 000 ft
options.c: Don't put on oxygen masks since the decompression started in the cabin and not in the flight crew compartment
